violations.text: Menus are lacking allergen statements. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Test strips have been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Rice was made yesterday and was observed at 47 DF. Rice was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025

Salmon was observed thawing in the fridge without a hole made in the ROP package. The salmon was 35 degrees internal, and holes were made in every package. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on 2 door fridge four. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2023
